pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script copies the base project file to this target path before the task starts.

metadata_value.name: Install security panels, cameras, and card readers

verified_value.name: Install security panels, cameras, and card readers

pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates the task names, their respective durations, and their precedences. Verification against sample_project.xml confirms that the specified predecessors (Task 122 is 'Pull wire in conduit and set area transformers', Task 123 is 'Install and terminate electrical devices') match the textual descriptions.
Matches the exact resource assigned to all four tasks in the task description.
Parsed the base project file (assets/sample_project.xml) to find the 'Electric Contractor' resource and confirmed its UID is indeed 15.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on '/home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml', which is copied from a sample project. The required changes involve adding four new sequential tasks under a 'Security Systems' group with specific durations and dependencies. The task dependencies refer to existing project tasks: UID 122 ('Pull wire in conduit and set area transformers') and UID 123 ('Install and terminate electrical devices'). All new tasks must be assigned the 'Electric Contractor' resource, which corresponds to resource UID 15 in the ProjectLibre XML schema for this project file.
